articles.description: British record signing Alexander Isak will return to Liverpool training on Thursday, head coach Arne Slot confirms.
articles.title: Alexander Isak: Liverpool striker to return to team training on Thursday

articles.description: The Premier League's KMI Panel says both referee and VAR were right not to give a penalty to Manchester United's Amad Diallo at Bournemouth.
articles.title: Bournemouth v Man Utd: Referee and VAR correct on Amad Diallo penalty claim - panel

articles.description: Tiger Woods turns down the role of United States Ryder Cup captain next year in Ireland, the PGA of America announces, as he steps away from golf following last week's car crash.
articles.title: Tiger Woods turns down US Ryder Cup captaincy in 2027, PGA of America says

articles.description: Ten years after playing for Accrington, Anthony Barry is hoping to help Thomas Tuchel win the World Cup for England.
articles.title: Anthony Barry: The English coach helping Thomas Tuchel

articles.description: NFL teams splashed out billions in free agency, but what were the biggest moves and who were the biggest spenders? BBC Sport takes a look.
articles.title: NFL free agency 2026: What were the biggest deals & biggest spending teams?

articles.description: With award season just around the corner, BBC Sport experts pick their contenders for Premier League player of the year. Do you agree?
articles.title: Player of the season favourites: Who should win Premier League award? Rice, Gabriel, Fernandes, Semenyo, Thiago

articles.description: Victor Wembanyama scores a season-high 41 points as the San Antonio Spurs beat the Golden State Warriors 127-113 for their 10th successive win.
articles.title: NBA results: Victor Wembanyama scores 41 as Spurs win 10 in a row

articles.description: As Max Dowman becomes the latest academy product to make an impact in the Premier League, BBC Sport looks at who uses their youngsters most.
articles.title: Who uses academy players most in Premier League - and does it matter?

articles.description: Mayzee Davies returns to the Wales squad for this month's World Cup qualifiers against Albania but there is no place for injured goalkeeper Olivia Clark.
articles.title: Women's World Cup qualifying: Wales recall Mayzee Davies to face Albania

articles.description: Asian Cup finalists Australia and Japan say organisers ignored their request to address the prize money inequality between men's and women's teams.
articles.title: Australia & Japan's equal prize money request 'ignored'
